plan_metadata.name: Teams Agent With Data Customize Azure OpenAI js Local Debug

steps.description: Click on the "Teams Agents and Apps" option within the "New Project" dropdown menu.
Click on the "Teams Agent with D..." option in the dropdown menu under "Teams Agent or App Using Teams AI Library" to select it.
Click the "Customize" dropdown option in the "Select an option to load your data" menu within the "Teams Agent with Data" interface.
Click on the "JavaScript" option in the "Programming Language" dropdown menu within the Visual Studio Code interface.
Click the "Default folder" option located in the "Workspace Folder" dialog to select the predefined folder path: `/home/vscode/AgentsToolkitProjects`.
